buildings.name: Forge (Lv1)
buildings.description: Formalize the town forge — unlocks advanced forge upgrades.

buildings.name: Forge (Lv2)
buildings.description: Elemental infusions — reduced material costs at the forge.

buildings.name: Herbalist Hut
buildings.description: Buy potions and food with gold. Press E to browse stock.

buildings.name: Inn
buildings.description: Rest well — gain a temporary HP boost for your next dungeon run.

buildings.name: Shrine
buildings.description: Purify cursed weapons or bless them with new affixes. Press E for services.

buildings.name: Guild Hall
buildings.description: Accept bounties for bonus gold and XP rewards. Press E for bounty board.
